title: The 20-Second Hug
points: Start a "20 second hug" tradition early — for goodnight, celebrations, after conflict, or just because
The real payoff comes in the teen and adult years, when long hugs become rare but deeply meaningful
Make it a game when they're little — count together, drag out the last few numbers, squeeze at the end
It becomes a shared language that bypasses the need to talk through every difficult moment
A small, consistent ritual can carry a relationship through decades

title: The "X" Escape Code
points: Create a secret code — a single text they can send when they need an out, no questions asked
You call back in full "angry dad" mode, giving them a believable reason to leave without losing face
Lets them stay safe without being labelled a snitch or a pushover — they just have the annoying dad
Be willing to play the villain to protect them; wear that badge proudly
The goal isn't to be the cool parent — it's to be the safe parent

title: Don't Yell — You're the Regulated One
points: Kids' brains and emotions are genuinely not fully developed — they can't regulate themselves yet, that's your job
When things escalate, take a step back instead of matching their energy
You can be firm and stern without losing control — those aren't the same thing
Staying calm leads to more lessons learned, easier days, and far fewer regrets
Being the regulated adult in the room is one of the most powerful things a parent can do

title: The "Can I Lift You?" Meal Trick
points: After meals, try to lift your toddler — if you can, they haven't eaten enough
Kids find it hilarious when you can't lift them, so they're motivated to keep eating
Turns a mealtime battle into a game they actually want to win
Laughter and play are underrated parenting tools — especially for toddlers
Sometimes the best hacks are the dumbest ones

title: Iodine Supplementation During Pregnancy
points: For the mumma
Take 150 mcg of iodine daily throughout your entire pregnancy.
Adequate iodine intake supports fetal development and thyroid health.
